raw: GO Pass offers free or reduced admission for up to two adults and any children under 18. Check specific listings for admission pricing. GO Pass admission is equivalent to a Trustees Family Membership admission price. GO Passes are valid for admission only; not valid for discounts at parking kiosks, stores, cafes, inns, campgrounds, at special events or programs, on equipment rentals, or in place of any permits or passes. For a listing of locations and venues that take this pass, please visit the Trustees of Reservations website (here.)
